description: Round-7 audit: confirmed --compile-check false-READY fixtures. Each is a document the CLI reports READY (exit 0) but pdflatex rejects under the strict READY oracle. The monotone gate (scripts/tools/check_known_false_ready.py) runs the CLI only (no TeX) and fails if any fixed fixture regresses or a live false-READY appears where none was recorded. Each R7 fix PR flips its entries' expected_cli to NOT-READY and lowers the baseline. Ground truth verified locally against pdflatex; refresh/verify with scripts/tools/false_ready_oracle.sh.
ready_oracle: clean single pass with no LaTeX Error (docs/COMPILATION_GUARANTEE.md SO1). strong-fatal = pdflatex produces NO PDF even under nonstopmode; error-halt = fails -halt-on-error / emits a LaTeX Error but limps to a PDF under nonstopmode.

fixtures.note: \lowercase lowercases FONTSPEC->fontspec at execution; case-sensitive needle misses it
\csname-constructed loader loads fontspec; no literal \usepackage token to match
polyglossia (pure-LaTeX surface, loads fontspec internally) requires xe/lua; outside the 5-needle catalogue
raw CJK/Han body codepoints with no font-setup package: Unicode-not-set-up fatal (no package catalogue can catch)
comment in comma-list package arg evades the verified scanner; pdflatex strips comment and loads fontspec
comment between loader macro and its brace group evades the scanner
drop_after_rbracket cuts option group at first ']'; LaTeX brace-protects ']'
CR-only EOLs: '%' blinds the comment scanner (no LF) for the rest of the file; pdflatex ends comment at CR and hits a fatal
^^7b = catcode-1 '{' decoded by pdflatex, by no scanner: unclosed-brace runaway
truncated file with no \end{document}: pdflatex Emergency stop

\endinput before \end{document}: TeX never reads the \end, Emergency stop [R7-2 endinput-first arm dropped after adversarial verification found it over-rejects \ifdefined\previewmode\endinput\fi; deferred to the live-region train]
the only \end{document} is inside a never-taken \iffalse; TeX skips it, EOF with no legal \end
\verb argument broken across a line: '\verb ended by end of line'
duplicate \begin{document}: 'Can be used only in preamble' (protocol-dependent)
\input{sections} where sections/ is a DIRECTORY: Sys.file_exists is true for dirs, pdflatex cannot open it

include cycle a->b->a: single-level scan never sees b's include of a; pdflatex recurses to capacity. Needs nested closure (R7-4 model half). NB direct self-include IS correctly caught by project_closed_b (B1-F2 headline over-claimed)
\bibliography inputs doc.bbl (just TeX); a fatal .bbl is never read by any component
corrupt/truncated .aux (interrupted-run artifact): 'File ended while scanning use of \@newl@bel'; the CLI ignores .aux parse failures (Error->[])
NUL byte in body text: 'Text line contains an invalid character'
260 nested groups exceed TeX's 255 grouping levels (parser's own guard sits at 500, wrong side)
\hyperref[l]{link text} moving-arg skip treats {link text} as a key; a double-superscript inside it is missed
